{"query":"Francis Ford Coppola Megalopolis summer 2025 speaking tour cities schedule","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1773,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/06/megalopolis-francis-ford-coppola-tour-1236436800/","title":"'Megalopolis' Road Tour Launching With Francis Ford Coppola Q&A","content":"Francis Ford Coppola‘s epic Megalopolis will be touring six cities this summer accompanied by the five-time Oscar winning filmmaker who’ll be holding a discussion titled “How to Change Our Future.”
“This is the way Megalopolis was meant to be seen, in a large venue, with a crowd and followed by intense interactive discussions about the future,” shared Coppola.
The Live Nation event kicks off July 20 at the Count Basie Center for the Arts in Red Bank, NJ.
Torn between them is socialite Julia Cicero (Nathalie Emmanuel), the mayor’s daughter, whose love for Cesar has divided her loyalties, forcing her to discover what she truly believes humanity deserves."},{"url":"https://www.choosechicago.com/event/an-evening-with-francis-ford-coppola-and-megalopolis-screening/","title":"An Evening with Francis Ford Coppola and Megalopolis Screening | 07/25/2025 | Choose Chicago","content":"Oscar-winning director Francis Ford Coppola, known for The Godfather, Apocalypse Now, and The Outsiders, will participate in a six-stop live tour at select coast-to-coast venues this summer.
Each night will feature a screening of Coppola’s monumental 2024 sci-fi/drama Megalopolis, capped by a lively discussion titled “How To Change Our Future” with the legendary filmmaker, and live audience Q&A.
This city center is home to some of Chicago’s most iconic attractions and architecture."},{"url":"https://relix.com/news/detail/francis-ford-coppola-to-take-megalopolis-on-tour-screening-and-qa/","title":"Francis Ford Coppola to Take 'Megalopolis' on Tour, Screening and Q&A","content":"The acclaimed director will continue with a live appearance on Friday, July 25, at The Chicago Theatre, followed by Sunday, July 27, at Denver’s Paramount Theatre.
Making his way out West, Coppola will participate in an evening at Dallas’ Texas Theatre on Tuesday, July 29, before the final screening and discussion on Friday, August 1, at San Francisco’s Palace of Fine Arts.
Moreover, tonight, Wednesday, June 18, a televised special, The AFI Life Achievement Award: A Tribute to Francis Ford Coppola, will premiere on the TNT network at 10 p.m. local time.
Tickets will be available at ticketmaster.com starting Wednesday, June 18, at 1 PM ET / 10 AM PT."},{"url":"https://www.thecapitoltheatre.com/the-capitol-theatre/events/detail/an-evening-with-francis-ford-coppola-and-megalopolis-screening","title":"An Evening with Francis Ford Coppola and Megalopolis Screening | The Capitol Theatre","content":"Francis Ford Coppola and Megalopolis. Date July 23, 2025 / Wednesday Doors Open 5:30 PM Start 7:00 PM Ticket Prices $40.00 - $85.00 Venue The Capitol Theatre ...
18+ unless accompanied by a parent or legal guardian.
Legendary director, Francis Ford Coppola (The Godfather, Apocalypse Now, The Outsiders) is bringing his monumental 2024 film, MEGALOPOLIS, to select cities across the country.
This exclusive event offers a rare chance to experience the film as it was meant to be seen—on the big screen, surrounded by a live audience."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/francis-ford-coppola-megalopolis-tour-screenings-1236294201/","title":"Francis Ford Coppola Taking ‘Megalopolis’ on Tour For Screenings","content":"Tickets are on sale now via Ticketmaster.
Coppola and Megalopolis will then move on to cities including Chicago, Denver, Dallas and San Francisco.
Megalopolis, Coppola’s passion project decades in the making, is set in the futuristic city of New Rome.
Coppola self-financed the $120 million film, which bombed at the box office and has earned only $14.3 million worldwide to date.
“An Evening With Francis Ford Coppola and Megalopolis” tour dates are below."}]}
